title: Design Science Research Framework
description: Public draft release -- usable, citable, but still under active validation. Version 0.1.0 publishes a protocol-governed framework for planning, documenting, evaluating, reviewing, and publishing Design Science Research artifacts and artifact packages. The release includes structured specifications, models, vocabularies, schemas, templates, checklists, protocol documentation, evidence records, and source-to-framework alignment crosswalks. Non-code framework content is dedicated under CC0-1.0 Universal to maximize reuse, indexing, adaptation, translation, redistribution, and public benefit. Citation is appreciated and recommended but not required.
notes: Generated framework files only. No source PDFs or copyrighted source documents are included. Internal audit files and unmapped generated archives are excluded from the public package.
